title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell presents data on the rapid shift in software engineering toward autonomous AI agents. He notes that 30% of Cursor PRs are fully agent-developed, enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in a year, and engineers are transitioning to agent management roles.
